wizardSubtitle: Prepare your Mac for Wine and Battle.net

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: Kalimotxo can install almost everything for you: Homebrew (if missing), cabextract, GStreamer, Rosetta, Wine, DXMT and winetricks. macOS may ask for your administrator password once. The first run usually takes several minutes.
welcome.itemBattleNet: Battle.net install in Wine (Windows games on Mac)
welcome.skipHint: Open the launcher to browse the UI. Battle.net and Wine will need setup later.

system.title: System requirements
system.hint: If you do not have Homebrew, «Install dependencies» or «Prepare all» will try to install it (password required). cabextract can also be downloaded without brew.

runtime.title: Kalimotxo runtime
runtime.body: Downloads Wine Staging, DXMT and winetricks (~several hundred MB).

battlenet.title: Battle.net in Wine
battlenet.body: Kalimotxo creates the Wine bottle, installs Visual C++/DirectX and opens Blizzard's official installer. When the Wine window appears, sign in and let the client download finish.
battlenet.blizzardWizard: Kalimotxo finished its part. Complete the Blizzard wizard in the Wine window (client download). Then tap «Complete install» or «Next».

done.title: All set
done.body: You can install and play Windows titles with Battle.net. Open the client, sign in and download games from your Blizzard library.

auto.title: Automatic installation
auto.body: One click: Rosetta, Homebrew (if needed), cabextract, GStreamer, Wine runtime and automated Battle.net setup. Accept the administrator dialog if macOS shows it.
